FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Forgot Password?
FORGOT_PASSWORD.DESCRIPTION: Worry not, we'll send you instructions to help you reset it.

OTP.TITLE: Verify Code
OTP.DESCRIPTION: Please enter the code we just sent to your email.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Create a new password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Set a strong password to secure your account.
RESET_PASSWORD.SUCCESS: Your password has been successfully reset.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
